programme.title: 2023. Um cartomante arcano rouba o Enigma do Milênio, e Yugi precisa defendê-lo em um duelo para recuperá-lo! No entanto, não se trata de um simples advinho. Ele é um inimigo familiar e formidável do Reino dos Duelistas. Ou talvez não? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E01

programme.title: 2023. A misteriosa ameaça que controla Bandit Keith estilhaça o Enigma do Milênio antes de atear fogo na arena de duelos! Será que Yugi consegue remontar o Enigma do Milênio e salvar o espírito antes que tudo seja engolido pelas chamas? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E02

programme.title: 2023. A origem de Duel Monsters é revelada! Usando a mágica do Colar do Milênio, a historiadora egípcia Ishizu Ishtar mostra a Kaiba como Duel Monsters era jogado milênios atrás! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E03

programme.title: 2023. O espírito do Enigma do Milênio percebe que suas memórias do Egito antigo se esvaíram, mas Téa o ajudará a descobrir os mistérios de seu passado! No entanto, a busca deles é interrompida pelo duelista dançarino Johnny Steps e seus monstros do rock! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E04

programme.title: 2023. Yugi descobre que era um faraó poderoso que salvou o mundo 5.000 anos atrás e agora deve salvá-lo de novo! No meio-tempo, Kaiba testa os poderes de Obelisco, o Atormentador, do Deck dos Deuses Egípcios, contra a fúria do Dragão Supremo de Olhos Azuis! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E05

programme.title: 2023. Joey é forçado a entrar num duelo e pode perder seu precioso Dragão Negro de Olhos Vermelhos para os Caçadores Raros. Embora Joey esmague seus inimigos com sua poderosa armada de monstros, eliminar pontos de vida não é o único caminho para a vitória... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E06

programme.title: 2023. Hora de dominar novas regras e monstros. Que comece o Torneio da Cidade da Batalha! No primeiro duelo do torneio, Yugi desafia o Caçador Raro para recuperar o Dragão Negro de Olhos Vermelhos de Joey. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Caçador Raro, Parte 1: Começo de Cidade da Batalha
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E07

programme.title: 2023. Yugi se dá conta da estratégia do Caçador Raro de invocar o poderoso Exodia, mas é tarde demais para detê-lo! O Caçador Raro já tem quatro peças de Exodia na mão, e a quinta e última peça é a próxima carta do deck! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Caçador Raro, Parte 2: Encarando Exodia
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E08

programme.title: 2023. O duelista psíquico Espa Roba derrota Rex Raptor tão fácil quanto a um otário, e Joey é o próximo da lista! Quais são as chances de Joey, quando Espa Roba tem a habilidade telepática de ler todas as cartas na mão de Joey? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E09

programme.title: 2023. Joey descobre que a percepção extrassensorial de Espa Roba é uma farsa, mas ainda está sob seu controle! O Jinzo de Espa Roba não só massacra todos os monstros de Joey, mas fica mais poderoso a cada turno! A sorte de Joey chegou ao fim... Ou talvez não? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E10

programme.title: 2023. O duelista mágico Arkana transporta Yugi para a arena de duelos mais letal do mundo, em que o perdedor é enviado para o Reino das Sombras! Yugi tem que vencer esse duelo ou perderá muito mais que seu Mago Negro! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E11

programme.title: 2023. É Mago Negro contra Mago Negro! No entanto, enquanto Yugi só controla um Mago Negro, Arkana tem três em seu deck! Embora excedido em número, Yugi jamais desistirá, desde que continue confiando no coração das cartas! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E12

programme.title: 2023. Para encarar o Mago Negro de Arkana, Yugi tira um coelho da cartola: a Pequena Maga Negra! É a batalha dos sexos, para determinar o verdadeiro mestre dos magos! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E13

programme.title: 2023. O trapaceiro Weevil Underwood tece uma teia de mentiras para atrair Joey para um duelo desequilibrado! Weevil secretamente infesta o deck de Joey com um parasita que impede que Joey invoque monstros fortes! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E14

programme.title: 2023. Joey esmaga a Grande Mariposa Perfeitamente Suprema, mas Weevil solta a feroz Rainha dos Insetos, a joia suprema dos insetos, que fica mais forte com cada inseto horripilante que ela canibaliza! Será que a devastadora real de Will Weevil subjugará Joey? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E15

programme.title: 2023. Yugi enfrenta outro dos Caçadores Raros nefandos de Marik – o silencioso, mas mortal Strings! Strings detém todos os ataques de Yugi com Geleia Renascida, uma gosma escorregadia que ressuscita sempre que é destruída! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E16

programme.title: 2023. Strings invoca uma das criaturas mais poderosas da história de Duel Monsters... o monstro deus egípcio Slifer, O Dragão Celeste! Quais são as chances da esquadra de monstros mortais de Yugi contra um deus egípcio? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E17

programme.title: 2023. O feitiço Cartas Infinitas permite que Strings mantenha um número ilimitado de cartas na mão. Assim, Slifer, O Dragão Celeste de Strings pode desenvolver poder de ataque infinito! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E18

programme.title: 2023. Joey luta contra o duelista do mar Mako Tsunami e seu grupo de bestas marinhas! Se Joey vencer, ele terá todas as seis Cartas Localizadoras necessárias para entrar nos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas. Se ele perder, ele não terá chances! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E19

programme.title: 2023. O guerreiro oceânico de Mako O Pescador Lendário libera uma onda de destruição, destruindo os monstros de Joey das profundezas do mar sorrateiramente! As habilidades, treino e experiência de Joey serão testados ao extremo antes de ele ser liquidado. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E20

programme.title: 2023. Abduções abundantes! Marik, com a ajuda de Bakura, sequestra Joey e Téa! Para piorar as coisas, os Caçadores Raros também sequestram Mokuba para forçar Yugi e Kaiba a enfrentarem a dupla de duelistas Umbra e Lumis no topo de um arranha-céus! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Duelo Duplo, Parte 1: Yugi e Kaiba vs. Lumis e Umbra
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E21

programme.title: 2023. Yugi e Kaiba começam a exibir sinais de trabalho em equipe, mas é um pouco tarde demais quando Umbra e Lumis invocam a Fera Mascarada Des Gardius, uma ameaça monstruosa mais poderosa até mesmo que o Dragão Branco de Olhos Azuis! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Duelo Duplo, Parte 3: Yugi e Kaiba vs. Lumis e Umbra
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E23

programme.title: 2023. Yugi combina seus monstros magnéticos, formando a grande potência polar Valkyrion, o Guerreiro Imã! No entanto, Yugi nem imagina que Umbra e Lumis têm uma última máscara para fazer os monstros de Yugi se virarem contra ele... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Duelo Duplo, Parte 4: Yugi e Kaiba vs. Lumis e Umbra
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E24

programme.title: 2023. Yugi e Kaiba estão em uma missão de resgate para salvar seus amigos! Porém, ao longo do caminho, todas as suas preocupações e segredos são revelados ao passo que eles revivem os problemas que eles enfrentaram... e enfrentarão no futuro! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E25

programme.title: 2023. É amigo vs. amigo, já que Marik controla a mente de Joey, fazendo-o duelar contra Yugi! O perdedor será arrastado para o oceano para dormir com os peixes! Será que Yugi livrará Joey desse feitiço, ou Joey superará Yugi? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E26

programme.title: 2023. Embora Joey destrua os pontos de vida de Yugi, Yugi não consegue atacar seu querido amigo! Yugi invoca o monstro favorito de Joey, o Dragão Negro de Olhos Vermelhos, para fazer Joey recobrar os sentidos. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E27

programme.title: 2023. Yugi começa a quebrar o feitiço de Marik sobre Joey, mas agora terá que duelar sem o Enigma do Milênio! Quando Joey compra a carta necessária para dizimar os pontos de vida de Yugi, quais são as chances de Yugi, principalmente sozinho? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Daddy Daddy
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) reluctantly allows Romeo (Merlin Santana) to move in while finishing out his senior year of high school.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Me, Me and Miss Jones
programme.desc: Steve and Romeo (Steve Harvey, Merlin Santana) become rivals for the affections of a 25-year-old swimsuit model.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - No Free Samples
programme.desc: Rap artist Lil' Bow Wow (guest starring as himself) wants to sample an old hit of Steve's (Steve Harvey) group, the Hi-Tops. Jermaine Dupri and Ron Isley also guest star.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Walk Like a Man
programme.desc: Bernie sees children walking to school on their own and decides it is time for Jordan to do the same, despite Wanda's objections.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - For Whom the Belt Tolls
programme.desc: Wanda learns about Bernie's secret discipline-keeping device; its power corrupts her.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Prison Break
programme.desc: Bernie realizes his punishment system is no longer effective, so he puts the kids into a total lockdown.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Some Church Bull
programme.desc: In an effort to bring family members closer, Wanda insists they participate in the annual parish retreat.

programme.desc: After her best friend commits suicide, an unpopular girl discovers she has telekinetic powers and uses them to seek revenge on her humiliators.

programme.title: Carrie (2013)
programme.desc: Tormented by her peers and sheltered by her religious mother (Julianne Moore), an awkward teenager (Chloë Grace Moretz) unleashes her hidden, telekinetic powers after a sick prank at her senior prom pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Mulholland Falls (1996)
programme.desc: An ex-lover's murder creates problems for the married head (Nick Nolte) of an elite police unit in early '50s Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Untouchables (1987)
programme.desc: Though Prohibition agent Eliot Ness attempts to take Al Capone down, even his best efforts fail due to widespread corruption within the Windy City's police force.

programme.title: Project Hail Mary (2026)
programme.desc: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory slowly returns, he soon discovers he must solve the riddle behind a mysterious substance that's causing the sun to die out.

programme.title: The Martian (2015)
programme.desc: Left behind by his crew, a stranded astronaut must find a way to survive on Mars, while NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home.

programme.title: In the Land of Saints and Sinners (2023)
programme.sub-title: In the Land of Saints and Sinners (2023)
programme.desc: Hoping to leave his dark past behind him, former assassin Finbar Murphy leads a quiet life in a coastal Irish town. However, when terrorists show up, he must soon choose between exposing his secret identity and defending his friends and neighbors.

programme.title: Barefoot in the Park (1967)
programme.desc: A conservative lawyer (Robert Redford) marries a vivacious woman (Jane Fonda), and the two move into a busy Greenwich Village apartment.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: The residents of town stand at a crossroads unlike any they've faced before as Boyd sets a daring, and dangerous, plan in motion.

programme.title: Children of a Lesser God (1986)
programme.desc: Starting his new job as an instructor at a New England school for the deaf, James Leeds meets Sarah Norman, a young deaf woman who works at the school as a member of the custodial staff.

programme.title: Hour of the Gun (1967)
programme.desc: Wyatt Earp (James Garner) deputizes Doc Holliday (Jason Robards) and forms a posse to hunt Ike Clanton (Robert Ryan) and his gang.

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri (1954)
programme.desc: Recalled to duty, a lawyer (William Holden) leaves his wife (Grace Kelly) and goes to Korea to bomb bridges for an admiral (Fredric March).

programme.title: Cinderfella (1960)
programme.desc: Cinderfella's fairy godfather helps him escape from his wicked stepmother and stepbrothers.

programme.title: The Love Letter (1999)
programme.desc: A bookstore manager (Kate Capshaw) in a small town finds an anonymous love letter and searches for the person who wrote it.

programme.title: The Believers (1987)
programme.desc: A police psychologist (Martin Sheen) and his son (Harley Cross) discover a sacrificial cult in New York.

programme.title: Rings (2017)
programme.desc: A young woman (Matilda Lutz) makes a horrifying discovery after her boyfriend (Alex Roe) investigates a story about a mysterious video that kills people seven days after they watch it.

programme.title: Smile 2 (2024)
programme.desc: Global pop sensation Skye Riley begins to experience increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and pressures of fame, she must face her dark past to regain control of her life.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: The residents of town stand at a crossroads unlike any they've faced before as Boyd sets a daring, and dangerous, plan in motion.

programme.title: The Woman in Black (2012)
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Daniel Radcliffe) encounters ghostly goings-on at the foreboding estate of a recently deceased client.

programme.title: The Amityville Horror (1979)
programme.desc: A couple (James Brolin, Margot Kidder) battle a demonic presence in their new home, the location of many gruesome murders a year earlier.

programme.title: The Amityville Horror (2005)
programme.desc: Strange events take place after a family (Ryan Reynolds, Melissa George, Jesse James) moves into a new house that was the site of several gruesome murders.

programme.title: The Dark Half (1993)
programme.desc: A Maine professor's (Timothy Hutton) hidden bad side comes alive under his notorious but successful pen name.

programme.title: El Dorado (1966)
programme.desc: An old gunfighter (John Wayne), a drifter (James Caan) and a deputy sober up a sheriff (Robert Mitchum) to track down killers.

programme.title: Little Big Man (1970)
programme.desc: A 121-year-old white survivor (Dustin Hoffman) of the Battle of the Little Bighorn recalls his checkered life with Cheyenne, Wild Bill Hickok. Medicine shows and more.

programme.title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World (1963)
programme.sub-title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World (1963)
programme.desc: A motley assortment of characters embarks on a chaotic and slapstick-filled race to find $350,000 in buried loot.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business (2004)
programme.desc: The owner of a barbershop faces pressure from a corporation that is opening establishments in his neighborhood.

programme.title: Gung Ho (1986)
programme.desc: American autoworkers have a hard time accepting new work ethics when a Japanese car manufacturer takes over.

programme.title: Suburbicon (2017)
programme.desc: Suburbicon is a peaceful, idyllic, suburban community with affordable homes and manicured lawns. But the tranquil surface masks a disturbing reality, as family man Gardner Lodge navigates the town's dark underbelly of betrayal, deceit and violence.

programme.title: Soapdish (1991)
programme.desc: The star (Sally Field) of a soap opera is rattled by her ex-lover's (Kevin Kline) return to the daytime drama The Sun Also Sets.

programme.title: Cadillac Man (1990)
programme.desc: An angry husband (Tim Robbins) catches up to a wise-guy car salesman (Robin Williams) who cons customers and women.

programme.title: Team America: World Police (2004)
programme.desc: Puppet commandos protect the planet from fiendish terrorists and North Korean dictator Kim Jong Il (Trey Parker).

programme.title: The Naked Gun (2025)
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: A lazy New York cabby (Bill Murray) quits his job and convinces his bored buddy (Harold Ramis) they should join the Army.

programme.title: Beautiful Girls (1996)
programme.desc: The opposite sex preoccupies working-class pals gathered for their high-school reunion in small-town Massachusetts.

programme.title: Jason's Lyric (1994)
programme.desc: A TV salesman falls for a spirited waitress and clashes with his wayward brother, as their lives reconnect in inner-city Houston.

programme.title: What's the Worst That Could Happen? (2001)
programme.sub-title: What's the Worst That Could Happen? (2001)
programme.desc: When a professional thief robs a beachfront mansion, he catches the owner in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Max (2015)
programme.desc: The family of a fallen Marine adopts his traumatized service dog, giving both the four-legged veteran and a troubled teen the chance to heal.

programme.title: Max 2: White House Hero (2017)
programme.desc: Max, a military service dog, is assigned to serve on the U.S. president's Secret Service detail.

programme.title: Walking Tall (2004)
programme.desc: When Chris Vaughn returns to his hometown to find work, he finds that the lumber mill has closed and the town's big business is now a casino. Aided by his friend Ray Templeton, Vaughn tries to make a stand against the area's crime and corruption.

programme.title: Fire in the Sky (1993)
programme.desc: In 1975, logger Travis Walton and his co-workers discover a hovering UFO. Walton's pals flee, but he is not so fortunate.

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Mystic Pizza (1988)
programme.desc: Slinging pizza at a local restaurant, three girls share their hopes, dreams and plans for escaping their small town.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny (1991)
programme.desc: An ex-convict short-order cook (Al Pacino) chases a Manhattan waitress (Michelle Pfeiffer) who plays hard to get.

programme.title: Downhill Racer (1969)
programme.desc: A cocky American skis and après-skis Europe, training with his coach for the Olympics.

programme.title: Kickback (2022)
programme.desc: A documentary following the decades-long crusade of investigative journalist Andrew Jennings to expose corruption inside FIFA, football's sole governing body and the largest sports organization in the world.

programme.title: Last Vegas (2013)
programme.desc: Aging friends (Michael Douglas, Robert De Niro, Morgan Freeman) head to Las Vegas to celebrate the end of one's long bachelorhood and relive their glory days.

programme.title: Piranha (2010)
programme.desc: Spring break turns gory at a popular waterside resort, where hundreds of prehistoric man-eating fish have come to dine on hapless humans.

programme.title: Friday the 13th (1980)
programme.desc: The reopening of Camp Crystal Lake spells murder and mayhem for a group of sexually promiscuous counselors.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part 2 (1981)
programme.desc: Mrs. Voorhees' son Jason is waiting when another load of teens (Amy Steel, John Furey, Adrienne King) tries to make a buck at Camp Crystal.

programme.title: Erotic Alien Encounter (2024)
programme.desc: A humanoid alien named David gets stranded on Earth and is befriended by a beautiful nurse named Kate. With help from her best friend, Kate is determined to help David return to his home planet before government agents get to him first.

programme.title: Paid in Full (2002)
programme.desc: A dry cleaner's delivery boy becomes one of the most powerful drug dealers in the 1980s Harlem. Based on a true story.

programme.title: War Pony (2022)
programme.desc: The interlocking stories of two young Oglala Lakota men grappling with a world built against them as they navigate their unique paths to manhood.

programme.title: Snake Eyes (1998)
programme.desc: A corrupt detective (Nicolas Cage) and his Navy friend (Gary Sinise) probe a U.S. official's assassination at an Atlantic City boxing match.

programme.title: The Hurricane (1999)
programme.desc: Aided by a Brooklyn teen (Vicellous Reon Shannon) and three Canadians, boxer Rubin Carter (Denzel Washington) fights to be exonerated after long imprisonment for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: The Foreigner (2017)
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: Recurring nightmares of the planet Mars lead a confused earthling into the center of an intergalactic conspiracy.

programme.title: Enemy at the Gates (2001)
programme.desc: A Nazi sniper (Ed Harris) travels to Stalingrad to find and kill a Russian sharpshooter (Jude Law), the hero of the propaganda campaign of a political officer (Joseph Fiennes).

programme.title: Quantum of Solace (2008)
programme.desc: James Bond's (Daniel Craig) hunt for those responsible for Vesper Lynd's death leads him to a ruthless businessman (Mathieu Amalric) who is plotting to seize control of a valuable resource.

programme.title: Day of the Fight (2023)
programme.desc: On the day of his first fight since his release from prison, a former boxing champion reconnects with his trainer, ex-wife, childhood friend, and abusive father in a quest for forgiveness and closure.

programme.title: Homefront (2013)
programme.desc: A former DEA agent (Jason Statham) returns to action to save his daughter and his new town from a drug-dealing sociopath (James Franco).

programme.title: Fatman (2020)
programme.desc: After receiving a lump of coal in his stocking, a disgruntled 12-year-old hires a highly skilled assassin to kill Santa Claus.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate (2019)
programme.desc: Seasoned warrior Sarah Connor joins forces with a hybrid cyborg human and the T-800 model to protect a young woman from the Rev-9 -- a newly modified and seemingly indestructible liquid Terminator from the future.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Last Movie (2024)
programme.desc: Cheech Marin and Tommy Chong discuss their lifelong friendship and popularity as a comedic duo. Features interviews, sketches and never-before-seen footage spanning their five-decade career.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace (2008)
programme.desc: James Bond's (Daniel Craig) hunt for those responsible for Vesper Lynd's death leads him to a ruthless businessman (Mathieu Amalric) who is plotting to seize control of a valuable resource.

programme.title: Son of Rambow (2007)
programme.desc: Though polar opposites, two schoolboys in the 1980s England work together on a homemade action film inspired by "Rambo: First Blood."

programme.title: Borrego (2022)
programme.desc: After witnessing a drug mule's plane crash in the Borrego desert, Elly is kidnapped and forced on a dangerous journey to a remote drop-off point.

programme.title: Snag (2023)
programme.desc: After learning the woman he once loved is being held captive by ruthless gangsters, a lone wolf seeks out allies and storms into a world of violence to rescue her.

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: The Godfather (1972)
programme.desc: Crime boss Vito Corleone and his sons, the ruthless yet loyal members of the Corleone family, rule their secretive New York empire with an iron fist.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II (1974)
programme.desc: Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) rules his father's criminal empire, while flashbacks recall young Vito's (Robert De Niro) climb to power.

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger (1994)
programme.desc: An acting CIA chief (Harrison Ford) learns the president has triggered a war with Colombian drug cartels.

programme.title: Faster (2010)
programme.desc: A veteran cop (Billy Bob Thornton) and an assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen) track an ex-convict (Dwayne Johnson) who is on a mission to take revenge on his brother's killers.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street (2012)
programme.desc: Two cops must confront their teenage angst all over again when they go undercover as high-school students.

programme.title: Blue Story (2019)
programme.desc: Best friends Timmy and Marco go to the same high school but live in neighboring London boroughs. When Marco gets beaten up by one of Timmy's friends, the two boys wind up on rival sides of a gang war in which there are no winners, only victims.

programme.title: Murder Company (2024)
programme.desc: During the D-Day invasion, a group of U.S. soldiers must smuggle a member of the French resistance behind enemy lines to assassinate a high-value Nazi target.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Escape From L.A. (1996)
programme.desc: The fascist U.S. president enlists a jailed war hero (Kurt Russell) to retrieve a top-secret device stolen by his daughter on island Los Angeles in 2013.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County (2023)
programme.sub-title: The Last Stop in Yuma County (2023)
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a traveling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Stop-Loss (2008)
programme.desc: A soldier (Ryan Phillippe) whose tour of duty has ended takes matters into his own hands when the Army tries to force him back into active duty in Iraq.

programme.title: The Presidio (1988)
programme.desc: An Army provost marshal (Sean Connery) clashes with a detective (Mark Harmon) over a murder at the San Francisco military base.

programme.title: The Dictator (2012)
programme.desc: A North African tyrant (Sacha Baron Cohen) risks his life to ensure that democracy never comes to the country he so lovingly oppresses.

programme.title: Jeff, Who Lives at Home (2011)
programme.desc: A 30-year-old slacker (Jason Segel) finds his true destiny while helping his brother (Ed Helms) stalk the latter's possibly adulterous wife.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renée Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renée Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: Parallel (2024)
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Raging Grace (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Tabloid (2010)
programme.desc: In the 1970s, former Miss Wyoming Joyce McKinney becomes obsessed with a Mormon acquaintance and flies to England to abduct him after he goes there for missionary work.

programme.title: Rumours (2024)
programme.desc: Leaders of the world's wealthiest democracies become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods, and they realize they are suddenly alone.

programme.title: Pretty Red Dress (2022)
programme.desc: The story of Travis, Candice and their daughter, Kenisha, and their relationships with the same red dress.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: Wishful Thinking (1996)
programme.desc: A young woman (Drew Barrymore) falls for her best friend (James LeGros) while he looks for the man his girlfriend (Jennifer Beals) is having an affair with.

programme.title: Last Weekend (2014)
programme.desc: Petty squabbling marks the Memorial Day reunion of an affluent matriarch (Patricia Clarkson) and her dysfunctional family (Chris Mulkey, Zachary Booth).

programme.title: Personal Shopper (2016)
programme.desc: A young American in Paris works as a personal shopper for a celebrity. She seems to have the ability to communicate with spirits, like her recently deceased twin brother. Soon, she starts to receive ambiguous messages from an unknown source.

programme.title: The Fan (1981)
programme.desc: Douglas, a record salesman, is an obsessive fan of actress Sally Ross. When his letters are rejected, he strikes out at her and her loved ones.

programme.title: The General's Daughter (1999)
programme.desc: Two investigators (John Travolta, Madeleine Stowe) find an underworld of sex and cover-ups behind an Army captain's murder.

programme.title: The Night Clerk (2020)
programme.desc: A hotel clerk becomes the prime suspect when a woman is murdered during his shift. As the police investigation closes in, he makes a personal connection with a guest -- but soon realizes he must stop the killer before she becomes the next victim.

programme.title: Don't Knock Twice (2016)
programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Strange Darling (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer's vicious murder spree.

programme.title: Wishful Thinking (1996)
programme.desc: A young woman (Drew Barrymore) falls for her best friend (James LeGros) while he looks for the man his girlfriend (Jennifer Beals) is having an affair with.

programme.title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.sub-title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.desc: Lorine Padilla joins a street gang in the Bronx, N.Y., before becoming an activist and spiritual adviser.

programme.title: Sarafina! (1992)
programme.desc: A South African student (Leleti Khumalo) joins the anti-apartheid revolution in her township of Soweto.

programme.title: The Tribes of Palos Verdes (2017)
programme.desc: When the situation at her idyllic Palos Verdes home turns volatile, young Medina attempts to surf her way to happiness.

programme.title: Nine (2009)
programme.desc: An Italian director (Daniel Day-Lewis) endures personal and creative crises as he tries to juggle relationships with his wife (Marion Cotillard), his mistress (Penélope Cruz) and numerous other women.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Bride and Prejudice (2004)
programme.desc: Mrs Bakshi is looking for suitable husbands for her daughters. When the rich single gents Balraj and Darcy visit, the Bakshis have high hopes, but circumstances get in the way of romance.

programme.title: View From the Top (2003)
programme.desc: A woman (Gwyneth Paltrow) from a small Nevada town makes friends while training to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friend's wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet (2025)
programme.desc: Hoping to stay in the country, a gay man proposes a green card marriage to a female friend in exchange for paying for her IVF treatment. However, things get complicated when his grandmother surprises them with an extravagant Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: Jenny's Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: Beyond the Opposite Sex (2018)
programme.desc: A transgender man and woman face the challenges of maintaining relationships.

programme.title: 4:44 Last Day on Earth (2011)
programme.desc: Two lovers (Willem Dafoe, Shanyn Leigh) immerse themselves in sex, art and other activities after word breaks that the world will end by the next morning.

programme.title: Would You Rather (2012)
programme.desc: Iris (Brittany Snow) and seven other desperate people become trapped in Shepard's (Jeffrey Combs) mansion. Shepard forces them to play a sadistic game for a large sum of money -- but the dilemmas become increasingly deadly.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Shall We Dance? (2004)
programme.desc: A married Chicago attorney (Richard Gere) takes dancing lessons with a beautiful woman (Jennifer Lopez) he saw through a window.
